mapper.select: select cps.id, cps.sku_code, cps.sku_name, cps.product_id, cps.create_time, cps.origin_price, cps.current_price, cps.sku_pics, cps.amount, cps.limit_amount, cps.state, cps.if_default, cps.update_time, cps.sort_order, cps.remarks, cmi.merchant_name as merchantName from cm_product_sku cps left join cm_product cp on cps.product_id = cp.id left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cp.merchant_id = cmi.id where cps.deleted = '0' and cps.product_id = #{productId}
